name: ddl-generator-output-format
description: DDL generator provides generateSQL(schema, dialect): string[] that returns array of SQL statements in topologically sorted order. This output feeds directly to BunSqlExecutor for migrations. Flow: Enhanced JSON Schema -> generateDDL() -> DDLOutput -> ddlOutputToSQL() -> string[] -> BunSqlExecutor.executeMany(). The DDL generator already handles: table creation order, foreign key dependencies, junction tables.
recommendation: db.migrate tool will: (1) Call generateSQL(schema, createPostgresDialect()), (2) Execute each statement via BunSqlExecutor.execute(), (3) Handle IF NOT EXISTS for idempotency (may need DDL generator enhancement).
